title: Phase 1: Encrypted keyfile storage
description:
Currently identity.key is stored as raw 32-byte Ed25519 seed with no passphrase protection. If the file is read, the identity is fully compromised.

Required:
- Passphrase prompt on  and on every command that loads the key
- Key derivation: argon2id with tuned parameters
- Encryption: xchacha20poly1305 or age (filippo.io/age)
- Prefer age: battle-tested, good Rust support, human-friendly format
- Store encrypted blob, not raw seed
-  flag for testing/CI only, prints loud warning
